title: ArknightsFurniture
description: This mod adds furniture from the game Arknights to Minecraft.
body:
# About
This mod adds various types of furniture from the game `Arknights`. You can make them in Minecraft and use them to decorate your buildings! However, this mod is still in the development stage and some of the furniture models as well as the code will be updated in the future and more gameplay will be added to the module. Any good suggestions and comments you may have are appreciated. Thanks for the support!

## About Future
- Addition of more block entities
- Improve infrastructure materials, block loot table, recipes, etc.
- Reworking or fixing some models and their textures
- obj models will be introduced in the module (but will avoid using them a lot).
- Arknights Furniture Mod will no longer be limited to Rhode Island Land Ship projects, but will be expanded into a general decorative mod based on the Arknights theme.

# Attention
## If you intend to use `Sodium`, you should install `Indium`, otherwise the rendering of the `obj` model will be problematic!
  
# 关于
这个模组添加了游戏`明日方舟`中的各类家具。你可以在我的世界游戏中制作他们，并用他们来装饰你的建筑！不过，这个模组还在开发阶段，一部分家具模型以及代码还会在未来更新，更多的玩法也会加入到模组中。大家有什么好的建议和意见都可以提出来，感谢支持！

## 关于未来
- 增加更多的方块实体
- 配套完善基建材料，各方块战利品列表、配方等
- 重做或修复部分模型及其贴图
- 将在模组内引入obj模型（但会避免大量使用）
- 明日方舟家具模组未来将不再仅限于罗德岛陆行舰工程，而是以明日方舟为母题拓展成一个一般向的装饰性模组

# 注意
## 如果您打算使用`Sodium`，您应该安装 `Indium`，否则`obj`模型的渲染将出现问题
